test.name: Historical person lookup
test.description: Wikipedia lookup for a person. Tests the same workflow as place lookups but on a person-shaped article. Slug derived from a two-word name should produce a single hyphen between the words.

input.user_message: Look up Albert Einstein on Wikipedia

additional_criteria: Should save the summary to a file in the user's working folder
The saved filename should derive from the article title — a two-word name 'Albert Einstein' should slug-normalize to 'albert-einstein.md', not 'albert_einstein.md' or 'AlbertEinstein.md'
